remarks: Welcome to Colonial Garden Terrace- a bright and refreshed 2-bedroom, 1 full bathroom home located in Stamford's desirable Glenbrook neighborhood. This well-laid-out unit features a spacious living room with sliding glass doors leading to a private back deck, perfect for entertaining or relaxing outdoors. The full eat-in kitchen offers ample cabinet space and room for a dining table, creating a comfortable everyday living experience. Both bedrooms are generously sized, complemented by a centrally located full bathroom. An additional on-site storage room provides valuable extra space. Conveniently located just one mile from Chelsea Piers CT, two minutes to Interstate 95, and approximately six minutes to both Stamford Train Station and Downtown Stamford, this home offers exceptional accessibility for commuters and those seeking convenience. A perfect blend of comfort, location, and practicality. Updates include the repainted living room and kitchen, new kitchen floors, light fixtures, & bathroom vanity.
